{{- /* Extract first fenced block for a language tag from page markdown body. Expects: dict "page" $page "lang" "kotlin" Returns: trimmed code string (partial return). */ -}} {{- $p := .page -}} {{- $lang := .lang -}} {{- $raw := $p.RawContent -}} {{- if not $raw -}} {{- errorf "home/examples: empty RawContent (missing body?) in %s" $p.File.Path -}} {{- end -}} {{- $tag := printf "```%s" $lang -}} {{- $parts := split $raw $tag -}} {{- if lt (len $parts) 2 -}} {{- errorf "home/examples: no ```%s fence in %s" $lang $p.File.Path -}} {{- end -}} {{- $rest := index $parts 1 -}} {{- $code := index (split $rest "```") 0 | strings.TrimSpace -}} {{- return $code -}}
